description_long: This guard rail consists of five evenly spaced horizontal bars made of metal, supported by two vertical posts on either side. The bars are cylindrical and have a smooth, glossy black finish, giving the structure a modern and durable appearance. The vertical posts extend slightly above and below the top and bottom rails, with small protruding tabs for mounting or attachment. The overall construction is robust, designed to act as a linear barrier for pedestrian or vehicular safety in urban environments such as sidewalks, parking lots, or parks. The ends of the posts are blunt and unadorned, with no visible flaring or energy-absorbing features. There are no reflective markings or additional safety features visible on the surface.
description: A sturdy, black metal guard rail with five horizontal cylindrical bars and two vertical posts, designed for urban safety barriers. The surface is smooth and glossy, with blunt ends and no reflective markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal bars and both vertical posts, highlighting the full width and structure of the guard rail.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the edge of the vertical post and the ends of the horizontal bars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all five horizontal bars and both vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile with the vertical post and bar ends visible.
